name: consolidated safeguards script accepts a check name argument so the registered safeguard set is data-driven not hardcoded
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --check unknown-check-name 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_check' err.txt && grep -q 'registered_checks=' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
